description.tr: Rotterdam and Amsterdam sea options with optional England and United Kingdom relay into the Turkey corridor via Hanbros UK.
description.en: Rotterdam and Amsterdam sea options with optional England and United Kingdom relay into the Turkey corridor via Hanbros UK.

keyword.tr: Rotterdam LCL sailing cut-off, Amsterdam short sea UK relay, Antwerp alternative feeder planning
keyword.en: Rotterdam LCL sailing cut-off, Amsterdam short sea UK relay, Antwerp alternative feeder planning

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

LCL cut-offs drive available capacity.
text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.
